policy: Only build custom Forge modules when data/config/KubeJS/Open Loader cannot safely provide the needed result. Do not remove gameplay systems first; root-cause and bridge them.

modules.trigger: multiple systems need synced registry data, debug commands, or typed runtime access
modules.current_status: data-first JSON contract and KubeJS loader implemented

modules.trigger: vanilla scoreboard and CustomNPCs labels cannot deliver polished dynamic rank/level/name UI
modules.current_status: data contract active; current fallback uses scoreboards and CustomNPCs display names

modules.trigger: CustomNPCs scripted profiles cannot reliably equip, defend, path, or repair generated NPCs
modules.current_status: generated NPC profiles and spawn functions active for testing

modules.trigger: datapack structure injection cannot avoid duplicates, bad facing, bad terrain, or third-party processor conflicts
modules.current_status: standalone Guild structures active; village-pool injection delayed

modules.trigger: coordinate/ring/region-aware progression cannot be enforced through config rules alone
In Control plus existing configs cannot express player-rank-aware or structure-proximity-aware spawns
modules.current_status: mob_ecology.json contract active; spawn rules not generated yet
